wordplay_note: A proper English name suggesting establishment
card_description: Pemberton is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Simulacra*. Der Alte — the secret power behind the presidential puppet. Name note: A proper English name suggesting establishment. The man behind the curtain — real power hiding behind simulated authority. First appears in *The Simulacra*.

reference.brief: Der Alte — the secret power behind the presidential puppet
reference.significance: The man behind the curtain — real power hiding behind simulated authority
